Risk Description: Payroll Controls may experience starter and leaver control gaps if ownership, data, controls, and evidence are not defined before build.
Control Objective: Reduce risk from starter and leaver control gaps through clear ownership, evidence, and review criteria.
Control Activity: Starter, leaver, salary, deduction, and bank detail changes require approval before payroll processing.
Evidence Required: Store payroll master change request, approval, processing, and effective date history.
System/Data Dependency: Sage Payroll and Xero Finance data, required fields, owner status, and evidence references must be available for review.
Residual Risk / Implementation Note: HR and payroll ownership of master data changes must be agreed.

Risk Description: Payroll Controls may experience payroll change approval delays if ownership, data, controls, and evidence are not defined before build.
Control Objective: Reduce risk from payroll change approval delays through clear ownership, evidence, and review criteria.
Control Activity: Payroll input files require preparer and reviewer sign-off before calculation.
Evidence Required: Record payroll input file version, preparer, reviewer, approval, and cutoff timestamp.
System/Data Dependency: Sage Payroll and Xero Finance data, required fields, owner status, and evidence references must be available for review.
Residual Risk / Implementation Note: Payroll cutoff rules and approval thresholds require policy sign-off.

Risk Description: Payroll Controls may experience manual payroll input checks if ownership, data, controls, and evidence are not defined before build.
Control Objective: Reduce risk from manual payroll input checks through clear ownership, evidence, and review criteria.
Control Activity: Payroll exceptions over threshold require investigation and approval.
Evidence Required: Preserve exception review notes and approval decisions.
System/Data Dependency: Sage Payroll and Xero Finance data, required fields, owner status, and evidence references must be available for review.
Residual Risk / Implementation Note: Sensitive payroll access roles must be configured carefully.

Risk Description: Payroll Controls may experience starter and leaver control gaps if ownership, data, controls, and evidence are not defined before build.
Control Objective: Reduce risk from starter and leaver control gaps through clear ownership, evidence, and review criteria.
Control Activity: Payroll register must reconcile to GL control accounts and payment file totals.
Evidence Required: Track payroll reconciliation owner/status history by period.
System/Data Dependency: Sage Payroll and Xero Finance data, required fields, owner status, and evidence references must be available for review.
Residual Risk / Implementation Note: GL account mapping must be validated before reconciliation testing.

Risk Description: Payroll Controls may experience payroll change approval delays if ownership, data, controls, and evidence are not defined before build.
Control Objective: Reduce risk from payroll change approval delays through clear ownership, evidence, and review criteria.
Control Activity: Payroll payment file release requires finance approval.
Evidence Required: Keep payment file approval evidence with approver, date, amount, and bank file reference.
System/Data Dependency: Sage Payroll and Xero Finance data, required fields, owner status, and evidence references must be available for review.
Residual Risk / Implementation Note: Historic payroll exception categories may need standardisation before rollout.
